description_long: This is a rectangular, upright milk carton with a predominantly white body and a blue top, featuring a white screw cap on the upper right corner. The front displays a playful illustration of a cow and a glass milk bottle, along with Russian text and a blue heart-shaped logo reading 'Савушкин'. The lower portion of the carton is decorated with a green grass motif, enhancing the dairy theme. The sides and back of the carton are covered with additional product information in Russian, including nutritional details and branding. One side features a partial cow illustration peeking from the edge, adding a whimsical touch. The carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard with a plastic cap, typical for liquid dairy packaging.
description: A rectangular white and blue milk carton with a screw cap, cow illustrations, and Russian branding, set on a green grass motif. The carton is made of laminated paperboard with a plastic cap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main branding, cow and milk bottle illustration, and the blue heart-shaped 'Савушкин' logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displays product information in Russian and a partial cow illustration near the bottom.
description_view_2: Back view is mostly plain with a small cow illustration peeking from the edge and minimal text.
description_view_3: Right side view contains detailed product information in Russian and the green grass motif at the bottom.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front features a blue heart-shaped 'Савушкин' logo, Russian text 'Молоко', a cow and milk bottle illustration, and additional Russian product information on the sides and back in blue and gray fonts.
